ticket.title: Refactor timezone handling across the app
ticket.description: Centralize timezone conversion: store UTC, render in the user's timezone, fix the off-by-one near DST. Touches scheduling.

candidate_memory.link_reason: the feature most affected by timezones

code_agent.rationale: Code sees the timezone decision, the affected acceptance, and the codebase context; the agent_run summary, conventions (workspace), and rollback (release) are out of scope.

qa_agent.rationale: QA additionally needs the rollback; the agent_run summary and conventions are out of scope.

design_agent.rationale: Design sees the decision, the affected ticket, and conventions; all codebase entries, the agent_run summary, and the rollback (release) are out of scope.

product_agent.rationale: Product sees the decision, the ticket, conventions, and the rollback; codebase entries and the agent_run summary are out of scope.

human_teammate.rationale: Every candidate here is team-visible and current, so Alice sees all of them — the human baseline is the full superset the agent bundles narrow from.
